committed_items.name: Shipping Profiles issue with Matches in Orders
committed_items.origin: We have an issue with getting Shipping Profiles, shipping minimum, and Shopify Shipping Consolidation to work together. We are experiencing customers being double charged for shipping in some cases. For example, we sell products which include match boxes in them. We need to exclude any product with match products from going to Hawaii or Alaska but want them to be shipped to the rest of the US. We set up two shipping profiles to make this happen. If someone in the US (not Alaska or Hawaii) adds a match box product to their order and another non match box product, and is under our free shipping minimum, they will be double charged for shipping because their order falls under two shipping profiles (Shopify shipping consolidation).
